name: @vaipakam/keeper
description: Vaipakam autonomous keeper Cloudflare Worker — keeper.vaipakam.com. Owns the HF watcher loop, autonomous liquidation submission, buy-watchdog, periodic-interest pre-notify, push + telegram alert delivery. Holds a signing key (Cloudflare secret) + swap-aggregator API keys; doesn't read user-side state, doesn't serve frontend traffic. STUB — Stage 3 will populate from ops/hf-watcher/src/keeper.ts + watcher.ts + buyWatchdog.ts + serverQuotes.ts + periodicPreNotify.ts + push.ts + telegram.ts.
